architectReview.evidence: Final architect review 77-G011ArchitectFinalRerun approved G011 checkpoint readiness with CLEAR architecture/product/code and zero blockers. Review confirmed append-only ledger reconciliation after G010 premature_complete nudges, G011 active as the expected pre-checkpoint state, passed final command receipts in artifacts/g011-final-reconciliation-test-report.json, and repository-boundary correctness: direct contentPackage.update calls are centralized in lib/content/repository.ts while compliance/content/export progress paths call updateContentPackageProgress and status transitions still use transitionContentPackageStatus.

executorQa.evidence: Executor QA/red-team 76-G011ExecutorQaFinal passed all G011 contract coverage, surface evidence, and adversarial cases with zero blockers using leader-recorded receipts. Leader verification passed npm test -- tests/p0-contract.test.ts, full npm test, npm run typecheck, focused Biome over touched files, Prisma validate, and npm run audit:prod. Source and contract evidence confirmed no direct non-repository contentPackage.update callsites outside lib/content/repository.ts, progress-only helper does not create fake statusTransition rows, progress floors remain monotonic, and G011 preserves append-only final reconciliation semantics.
redTeamCommands: npx biome check lib/content/repository.ts lib/compliance/service.ts lib/content/service.ts lib/export/service.ts

adversarialCases.scenario: A lingering prisma.contentPackage.update or tx.contentPackage.update call remains in compliance/content/export service code outside lib/content/repository.ts.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Only lib/content/repository.ts contains direct contentPackage.update calls; consumers call updateContentPackageProgress or transitionContentPackageStatus.

adversarialCases.scenario: A progress-only update logs a fake statusTransition row or changes package status.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: updateContentPackageProgress updates only progress; transitionContentPackageStatusInTransaction remains the only statusTransition.create path.

adversarialCases.scenario: Repeated compliance/content/export operations lower progress below an already-advanced package value.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Progress-only branches use Math.max(currentProgress ?? 0, floor) for content 0.55, compliance 0.65/0.75, and export 0.9.

adversarialCases.scenario: The final aggregate completion reuses stale G010 receipt evidence after later nudge events or deletes ledger nudges to force completion.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: G011 is appended and checkpointed as a fresh required story; old G010 checkpoint and nudges remain preserved in ledger.jsonl.

adversarialCases.scenario: Final reconciliation claims completion without full command receipts or durable goals/ledger evidence.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: G011 report records full tests, typecheck, focused Biome, Prisma validate, production audit, cleanup, architect, QA, goals, and ledger evidence with blockers [].

iteration.evidence: AI SLOP CLEANUP REPORT: executor cleanup review 74-G011StatusRoutingCleanup inspected the changed status/progress routing files and found zero blocking findings. Final verification found and fixed a P0 boundary regression, formatted touched implementation files, and fully reran the loop cleanly: P0 test artifact://680, full tests artifact://693 with 119 tests, typecheck artifact://695, touched-file Biome artifact://691, Prisma validate, production audit, architect 77-G011ArchitectFinalRerun, and executor QA 76-G011ExecutorQaFinal. A broad Biome check over unrelated product files still reports pre-existing CRLF formatting diagnostics and is not used as passing evidence; the touched implementation surface passes focused Biome. All blockers arrays are empty.
